headline: Hormel Foods: Near 6% Yield Looks Tasty, But Hot Inflation Remains A Key Risk
summary: Hormel Foods Corporation faces inflation pressure, but a low forward P/E and ~6% yield may appeal to income investors. Click for this HRL update.

headline: 3 S&P 500 Stocks We Think Twice About
summary: The S&P 500 (^GSPC) is often seen as a benchmark for strong businesses, but that doesn’t mean every stock is worth owning. Some companies face significant challenges, whether it’s stagnating growth, heavy debt, or disruptive new competitors.
